Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kalman]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is married to Edina.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is severely burned by a fiery monster wasp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Kalman vanished from the Latari Forest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 12''' — Kalman was Simon's father and a chivalrous man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Simon is the son of Kalman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is the father of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — Kalman is the father of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 7''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Eldest Nye refers to Simon as the son of Kalman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — Kalman is the father of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The son of Kalman wishes to challenge the graveyard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Kalman is the father of Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Kalman has a son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Eldest refers to Simon as the son of Kalman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — Kalman is Simon's father.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
